title: Tylostemon obscurus
taxonomy: Tylostemon obscurus is classified within the family Stemonaceae, which is a small family of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. Stemonaceae is part of the larger order Piperales, a group of flowering plants that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Stemonaceae is characterized by its unique flower structure and the presence of a single ovary in each flower. Within the family Stemonaceae, Tylostemon obscurus is likely to be part of the genus Tylostemon, although this information may require further research to confirm. Further taxonomic classification may be needed to accurately categorize Tylostemon obscurus.
